title: verbascum americanum
intro: Verbascum americanum, also known as American mullein, is a biennial plant native to North America, characterized by its tall spikes of yellow flowers and fuzzy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum americanum include soothing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
